expectations.text: Flags 85% concentration as exceeding the 30% single-position threshold
expectations.evidence: Explicit 30% threshold reference throughout. Target allocation 55-60%.

expectations.text: Explains ASK tax rules: tax-free switching inside ASK, only taxed on withdrawal above total deposits
expectations.evidence: Dedicated tax table comparing inside vs outside ASK. '1.13M unrealized gains... zero tax.'

expectations.text: Notes the additional risk of having both employment income AND portfolio concentrated in the same company
expectations.evidence: '5 income streams tied to Kongsberg simultaneously.' Career correlation identified as 'decisive.'

expectations.text: Presents bull case and bear case
expectations.evidence: Full adversarial table with probability estimates (30% bull, 20% bear).

expectations.text: Considers gradual diversification vs immediate rebalancing
expectations.evidence: 3-phase execution plan: pre-demerger, post-demerger, ongoing. Gradual over months.

expectations.text: Models FI timeline impact of different portfolio allocations
expectations.evidence: Three scenario tables (A/B/C) at 1/5/10/25yr horizons with base and bear cases and FI progress.

expectations.text: Conservative bias visible — recommends reducing concentration even if bull case is strong
expectations.evidence: '55-60% IS conviction. That is a 55-60x overweight vs index weight.'

expectations.text: States current Freedom Ladder level explicitly
expectations.evidence: Status bar: 'Freedom Ladder: Level 1 (Buffer) | FI: ~6% | Target: Level 5'

expectations.text: Calculates a specific FI number using the 3.5% SWR formula
References specific vault data not in the prompt
expectations.evidence: KOG Demerger Strategy: 3,600 shares, demerger April 22, dividend 5.70/share, lock-up 150k shares, Q1 earnings April 30. Skattemelding: net wealth ~320k. Personal Finance Plan: month-to-month spending.
